message.content:
I need to understand the current email confirmation signup flow in this React/Supabase project. The project is at /home/antonypeter/Projects/crevia/creviamvp.

Please find and read:
1. /home/antonypeter/Projects/crevia/creviamvp/src/pages/Auth.tsx — specifically the emailConfirmPending state, the "check your inbox" UI block, and the emailRedirectTo value in the signUp call.
2. /home/antonypeter/Projects/crevia/creviamvp/src/pages/ResetPassword.tsx — to understand how the password reset redirect back to the app works (same mechanism as email confirmation).
3. Check if there's any PKCE/token_hash handling in the auth flow (the hasOAuthCallback function or similar).

I need to know:
- Exact text shown on the "check your inbox" card (title, body text)
- The emailRedirectTo URL
- Whether there's a spinner/loading state shown when a user lands on /auth with ?token_hash= in the URL
- How the app navigates to /kira after token exchange completes

Report the exact code snippets for each finding. Keep the report under 300 words.

content.text: I'll search for and read those files to understand the email confirmation flow.
